hero.title:
FASHION.
BUT COMFORT.
hero.sub: Bánh Mì style from Vietnam. Premium EVA material. Anti-slip grip. Crocs quality confirmed. Ergonomic design that really fits, really comfy.

features.label: THE FEATURES
features.title:
BUILT DIFFERENT.
BUILT BETTER.
features.body: Every detail of the Driip Slide is engineered for those who refuse to compromise between style and comfort. From the streets of Vietnam to your feet.

banhMi.title: Bánh Mì Style
banhMi.desc: Inspired by the iconic Vietnamese sandwich shape — bold, chunky, instantly recognizable.

eva.title: Premium EVA Material
eva.desc: Lightweight, durable, and waterproof foam that cushions every step.

antislip.title: Anti-Slip Design
antislip.desc: Engineered grip pattern keeps you steady on any surface, wet or dry.

crocs.title: Crocs Quality
crocs.desc: Same level of quality and comfort that made Crocs a global phenomenon.

fashion.title: Fashion First
fashion.desc: It's fashion. Bold colors, statement design, unmistakably driip.

ergonomic.title: Ergonomic Fit
ergonomic.desc: Really fit. Really comfy. Contoured footbed that molds to your stride.

gallery.title: THE DRIP SLIDE
gallery.sub: Hot Pink & Cyan Blue — Two moods, one slide

manifesto.quote:

But it's comfort.
That's the driip way.
